response.step_by_step_log:
1. Reviewed video content to identify performers (Tokino Sora, Hoshimachi Suisei) and on-screen song metadata ("ダイダイダイダイダイキライ", "Amala").
2. Mapped the video into three main scenes based on content (intro, performance, post-talk).
3. Performed web search for the song lyrics using the original composer 'Amala'.
4. Successfully retrieved the full lyrics in both original Japanese and English translation.
5. Constructed the final JSON response, ensuring correct formatting and escaped double quotes within the lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video features a birthday celebration for Tokino Sora, where she and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song "ダイダイダイダイダイキライ" (Dai Dai Dai Dai Dai Kirai) by Amala, followed by a short discussion.

scenes.description: The video starts with a portal animation followed by the VTubers Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei appearing on stage. They introduce themselves.
Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song "ダイダイダイダイダイキライ" by Amala. Text "作詞・作曲: Amala" is visible on screen.
scenes.song_title: ダイダイダイダイダイキライ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's all, all your fault.
You're such a pain, it makes me wanna hurl.
Clinging to things, fawning over things...
I was stupid to think I'd get something out of it.
I'm a people-pleaser coming to pay my respects,
So gimme an hater life.
I've got a shallow capacity, thanks for your patronage.
Basically, my life's always been drab.
"How hateful! How pathetic!"
The way I can't ignore you makes it worse-
How maddening, how vexing.
I've had just about enough of blowing my own horn.
(Look around!!)
The opposite of like is apathy
≈ proof that you're connected.
A relationship I can't cut off...
I'd love to just look away from it.
This is what you'd call hate speech.
We're slapping these anonymous declarations onto our very lives.
We spasm every time those ceaseless sirens draw near.
We've obeyed red lights all this time.
Point is, 'bout you, I absolutely--hate hate hate hate hate you.
OMG, how pathetic, I just wanna say--bye bye bye bye bye already.
Can't predict what's going on in that mind, and thus there's--no no no no no solution.
How's it? 'Bout me, do you absolutely--hate hate hate hate me now?
Ah, all pain and no gain, nothing, not see.
It'd be like nicotine to think back on the what-ifs.
Getting close because "I miss you," was a stupid mistake, mistake.
Thanks for being a great bad example.
You've left an aftertaste that won't ever disappear.
Good, good, you're a good girl, smiling and spreading yourself around,
Good girl, but, but what's your true nature?
Can't you even tell right from wrong? LOL, sigh.
Winding myself up in an environment based on a point-deduction system,
My "It hurts! It hurts! It hurts!" won't be heard for a lifetime,
I got hit by the inevitable retribution.
People are mirrors.
In truth, dependency is on both sides.
Even if I shut down, I'm haunted by my own pathetic weakness.
It's all, all your fault, I can't stop feeling this way, it makes me wanna hurl.
I wish it were easier to just cut you off.
Point is, 'bout you, I absolutely--hate hate hate hate hate you.
OMG, how pathetic, I just wanna say--bye bye bye bye bye already.
Can't predict what's going on in that mind, and thus there's--no no no no no solution.
How's it? 'Bout me, do you absolutely--hate hate hate hate me now?
Ah, all pain and no gain, nothing, not see.
It'd be like nicotine to think back on the what-ifs.
Getting close because "I miss you," was a stupid mistake, mistake.
Thanks for being a great bad example.
You've left an aftertaste that won't ever disappear.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei discuss the song and their performance.
